title: Understanding the Forces
text: Each team exerts a force on the ground, which is transferred to the rope. The tension in the rope is the force that each team exerts on it.

title: Calculate Total Force Exerted by Each Team
text: To find the total force exerted by each team, multiply the average force exerted by one member by the number of members in the team.

title: Calculate Total Force for Team $$1$$
text: Calculate the total force exerted by the first team: $$9$$ members each exerting $$1350$$ N.

title: Calculate Total Force for Team $$2$$
text: Calculate the total force exerted by the second team: $$9$$ members each exerting $$1365$$ N.

title: Determine the Tension in the Rope
text: The tension in the rope is equal to the force exerted by either team, as they are pulling in opposite directions with equal force.

title: Calculate the Tension in the Rope
text: Since both teams exert equal force, the tension in the rope is equal to the force exerted by one team. Use the force calculated for either team.
